contentBlocks.title: When do you need to convert m² to ft²?
contentBlocks.html:
Square meter (m²) is the standard area unit in the metric system. Square foot (ft²) is used in the US, UK, and some Asian countries for real estate and construction. 1 m² = 10.7639 ft².

This conversion is essential for real estate (comparing property sizes internationally), interior design, construction, and office space planning.

Examples: a 50 m² apartment = 538 ft², a 100 m² house = 1,076 ft², a 200 m² office = 2,153 ft².

All calculations run locally in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.

contentBlocks.title: How does m² to ft² conversion work?
contentBlocks.html:
Since 1 foot = 0.3048 m, 1 ft² = 0.3048² = 0.092903 m². Therefore, 1 m² = 1/0.092903 = 10.7639 ft².

To convert m² to ft², multiply by 10.7639. To convert ft² to m², multiply by 0.092903.

Quick estimate: multiply m² by 11 for a rough ft² value. Example: 50 m² × 11 = 550 ft² (exact: 538 ft²).

contentBlocks.title: Practical tips
contentBlocks.html:
• Studio apartment: 30–40 m² = 323–431 ft².
  • 2-bedroom apartment: 60–80 m² = 646–861 ft².
  • Average US home: 200 m² = 2,153 ft².
  • Tennis court: 261 m² = 2,808 ft².

items.question: How do I convert apartment size?
items.answer: Multiply m² by 10.76. A 75 m² apartment = 807 ft².

items.question: Quick way to estimate?
items.answer: Multiply m² by 11 for a rough estimate. It overestimates by about 2%.

items.question: Are calculations done locally?
items.answer: Yes. All calculations run in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
